title: heliotropium pterocarpum
intro: Heliotropium pterocarpum, also known as the calycophyll, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Heliotropium pterocarpum include its potential to help reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and alleviate symptoms of digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
